caption:
Step into the library and watch the lights dim as I walk in, the low hum of the university buzzing around me like a secret waiting to be whispered. 👩‍🏫✨ I adjust my silk blouse, feeling the cool fabric slide over my skin as I catch the gaze of a student from the back row. It's always the late hours that make the air heavy with anticipation. Tonight, the air smells of old books and something more electric. 📚⚡ My pencil skirt clings just enough to hint at the curves beneath, the structured blazer draped loosely over my shoulders, ready to be shed if the mood strikes right. I lean against the mahogany desk, the wood cool against my palms, watching him fidget. He thinks he's here for a late-night study session, but the real lesson is about desire. 💋🔥 The clock ticks louder than the clock on the wall, and soon, the line between student and teacher blurs into something far more intimate. Just the right touch of my skirt against my thighs, the slight sway of my hips as I turn toward him, and the world narrows down to this moment. 🌙👠 I let out a soft breath, eyes locked on his, knowing that tonight, the curriculum is all about us.
